summary: Session 5 features fully tested: DiarioModal (side panel), BookingModal (centered), accessibility ARIA attributes, and full e2e flow questionnaire → register → results → portal.
critical_code_review_comments: DatePicker month select_option via Playwright's native select_option(selector, '3') doesn't work consistently - required using React's native input value setter trick (Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value').set) to properly trigger React state update. Not a bug but worth noting for future test automation.
bookingDate-month select_option also has same React synthetic event issue - JS evaluate workaround needed in testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 5 all passing. Auth is in-memory. Full e2e flow works: questionnaire(7 steps) → register(Carla Vega, carla@saude.com, TestPass1!) → /results → /portal. For Playwright testing: use React native input setter for DatePicker month (JS evaluate trick). DiarioModal testids: diario-pain, diario-energy, diario-mood-good/neutral/bad, diario-notes, diario-save. BookingModal testids: booking-name, booking-email, booking-date-day/month/year, booking-time-morning/afternoon/anytime, booking-submit, booking-success-close. Portal testids: widget-diario, widget-agendar.

test_results.portal_widget_diario_opens_DiarioModal: PASS - side panel slides from right
test_results.diario_pain_slider: PASS - value changes and persists to localStorage
test_results.diario_save_button: PASS - saves to localStorage key saude_diario_YYYY-MM-DD and closes modal
test_results.diario_data_persistence: PASS - reopening shows saved data (pain=9, mood=good)
test_results.e2e_full_flow: PASS - questionnaire(7 steps) → register(Carla Vega) → /results → /portal with all modals working
